page.title: Changes to deities in the Meiji period

revision.comment: Bot: mark 6 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24155476638|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:祭神の変更]]


This article describes the changes in enshrined deities and divine titles – such as those of the {{ill|Gongen|en|Gongen|qid=Q3080343|lt=Gongen|1=Gongen}}, {{ill|Gion Shrine|ja|祇園社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gion Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祇園神社|1=Gion shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11588442}}, and {{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|qid=Q11570247|lt=Gozu Tennō|1=Gozu Tennō}} shrines – resulting from the Meiji Restoration’s {{ill|Separation of Shinto and Buddhism Edict|ja|神仏分離令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Separation of Shinto and Buddhism Edict|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離|1=Shinbutsu bunri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1970535}} (also known as the “Shinbutsu Hannzenrei”) and subsequent {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|en|Shinbutsu-shūgō|qid=Q2279088|lt=Shinbutsu-shūgō|1=Shinbutsu-shūgō}}.
Subsequently, some temples and shrines have maintained their deities as they were, while others have restored or enshrined the previous deities alongside new ones. In addition, certain temples and shrines present the evolution of deities over time.
This is only one example; since there may be alternative theories regarding deities at various shrines, please refer to the detailed articles for each shrine.
== Gongen Changes ==
{{See also|List of Gongen|qq=}}
* {{ill|Atago Gongen|en|Atago Gongen|qid=Q1101132|lt=Atago Gongen|1=Atago Gongen}} → {{ill|Atago Ōkami|ja|愛宕大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 愛宕信仰|1=Atago Faith|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11493823}} (Atago Ōkami)
* {{ill|Akiba Gongen|ja|秋葉権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Gongen|qq=}}: Sanshakubō Daigongen → {{ill|Kagu-tsuchi|en|Kagu-tsuchi|qid=Q1640658|lt=Fire Kagutsuchi|1=Kagu-tsuchi}} (Kagutsuchi)
* {{ill|Iinawa Gongen|ja|飯縄権現|1=Izuna Gongen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iinawa Gongen|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuna Gongen|qq=}} (Iitsuna Myōjin): {{ill|Dakini|en|Dakini|qid=Q1127224|lt=Dakiniten|1=Dakini}} (Dakiniten) → {{ill|Ukemochi|ja|保食命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukemochi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 保食神|1=Ukemochi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2280323}} (Ukemochi)
* {{ill|Izuyama Gongen|ja|伊豆山権現|1=Izusan Gongen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuyama Gongen|13=User:Immanuelle/Izusan Gongen|qq=}} (Sōyu Gongen) → {{ill|Izuyama Ōkami|ja|伊豆山大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuyama Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491724|1=Izusan Gongen}} (Red-White Two Dragons)
* {{ill|Echichi Daigongen|ja|越知大権現|1=Ochi Daigongen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echichi Daigongen|13=User:Immanuelle/Ochi Daigongen|qq=}} → {{ill|Izanagi|en|Izanagi|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi|1=Izanagi}}
* {{ill|Konpira Gongen|lt=Konpira Gongen|lt=Konpira Daigongen|ja|金毘羅大権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Daigongen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金毘羅権現}} → {{ill|Ōmononushi|en|Ōmononushi|qid=Q10936701|qid=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi|1=Ōmononushi}}
* {{ill|Zaō Gongen|lt=Zaō Gongen|lt=Zao Gongen|ja|蔵王権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zao Gongen|qq=}} → {{ill|Emperor Ankan|en|Emperor Ankan|qid=Q241765|lt=Ankan Tennō|1=Emperor Ankan}} (Hirokuni Oshiken Kin-nichimei)
* {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}} → {{ill|Kikurihime|en|Kikurihime|qid=Q11619891|lt=Hakusan Hime|1=Kikurihime}} (Shirayama-hime)
* {{ill|Tateyama Gongen|ja|立山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateyama Gongen|qq=}} → Tateyama Daigongen (Yūyama no kami, Tōbi Tennjin, Tsurugi-dake no kami)
* {{ill|Ishibuto Daigongen|ja|石鈇大権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishibuto Daigongen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135551144}} → {{ill|Ishizuchi Ōkami|ja|石鎚大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishizuchi Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491726|1=Ishizuchi Ōkami}} (Ishidohibiko, i.e. Ishizuchi)
Note: Even after the official abolition of the “Gongen” title, this designation continues to be used to refer to temples and their enshrined deities.
== Changes at the Tennōsha ==
* {{ill|Gion Shrine|ja|祇園社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gion Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祇園神社|1=Gion shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11588442}}: ({{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|qid=Q11570247|lt=Gozu Tennō|1=Gozu Tennō}}) → {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}
== Others ==
* {{ill|Suitengū|en|Suitengū|qid=Q125319456|lt=Suitengū|1=Suitengū}}: ({{ill|Suiten|ja|水天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suiten|qq=}}) → {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|en|Ame-no-Minakanushi|qid=Q2842779|lt=Ame-no-Minakanushi|1=Ame-no-Minakanushi}} (Ame-no-Minakanushi), {{ill|Emperor Antoku|en|Emperor Antoku|qid=Q316651|lt=Emperor Antoku|1=Emperor Antoku}}, {{ill|Taira no Tokuko|en|Taira no Tokuko|qid=Q3315855|lt=Heitokushi|1=Taira no Tokuko}}, {{ill|Taira no Tokiko|en|Taira no Tokiko|qid=Q3379244|lt=Heijikoshi|1=Taira no Tokiko}}
* {{ill|Kumano Taisha|en|Kumano Taisha|qid=Q11568887|lt=Kumano Taisha|1=Kumano Taisha}}: ({{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}) → {{ill|Kushimikenu-no-mikoto|ja|櫛御気野命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushimikenu-no-mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135551145}} (Kushimikenu-no-mikoto)
* {{ill|Izumo-taisha|en|Izumo-taisha|qid=Q696362|lt=Izumo Taisha|1=Izumo-taisha}}: ({{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi|1=Ōkuninushi}} → {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}) → {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi|1=Ōkuninushi}}
* {{ill|Kanda Shrine|en|Kanda Shrine|qid=Q717682|lt=Kanda Myōjin|1=Kanda Shrine}}: Taira no Masakado was excluded from the enshrined deities as a rebel (although he was reinstated as a deity in 1984).
Among these changes, there are cases where deities that had been syncretized or equated – such as Gion with Susanoo and Hakusan Gongen with Hakusan Hime – are involved; however, {{Citation needed範囲|Other changes have been made based on interpretations of texts such as the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}, resulting in modifications to represent deities of the same or similar divine nature.|date=2014th year 6月|qq=}}. In addition, because Suiten shares the common attribute of being both {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|en|Ame-no-Minakanushi|qid=Q2842779|lt=Ame-no-Minakanushi|1=Ame-no-Minakanushi}} and a primordial deity, it was changed, and Suiten itself came to be equated with {{ill|Emperor Antoku|en|Emperor Antoku|qid=Q316651|lt=Emperor Antoku|1=Emperor Antoku}} (the Water Emperor) with whom it is jointly enshrined. Meanwhile, Kushimikenu-no-mikoto continues to be used as an epithet for Susanoo (and in some cases is also used as an alternate name for {{ill|Iotake-no-mikoto|ja|五十猛命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iotake-no-mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五十猛神|1=Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=五十猛神|4=zh|5=五十猛神}}).
== Temples and Shrines with Changed Deities ==
* {{ill|Gion cult|en|Gion cult|qid=Q11588425|lt=Gion Faith|1=Gion Faith}}<ref>[https://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~s_minaga/s_kumiyama.htm Yamashiro Province 久世郡・綴喜郡の神仏分離]</ref>
** {{ill|Kanjin-in Gion Shrine|ja|感神院祇園社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjin-in Gion Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八坂神社|1=Yasaka Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q692714}} → {{ill|Yasaka Shrine|en|Yasaka Shrine|qid=Q692714|lt=Yasaka Shrine|1=Yasaka Shrine}}
** Seta Gion Palace, Seta Kamishō Gion Palace → {{ill|Yasaka Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八坂神社 (みやま市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasaka Shrine (Miyama)|qq=}}
** {{ill|Shidorobimi Shrine|ja|止々呂美神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidorobimi Shrine|1=Todoromi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545325}}
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine|ja|八王子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine|qq=}}
* Zao Faith  
** {{ill|Konomine-dera|ja|國軸山金峯山寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konomine-dera|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135551146}} (tower head {{ill|Kissui-in|ja|吉水院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kissui-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 吉水神社|1=Yoshimizu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3572667}}) → Gokudo Tennōsha → {{ill|Yoshimizu Shrine|en|Yoshimizu Shrine|qid=Q3572667|lt=Kissui Shrine|1=Yoshimizu Shrine}}. Also, a new {{ill|Yoshino Shrine|en|Yoshino Shrine|qid=Q11414497|lt=Yoshino Shrine|1=Yoshino Shrine}} was established  
*** {{ill|Yoshino Castle|ja|吉野城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshino Castle|1=Yoshino Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11414377}}  
*** {{ill|Yoshino Gyōgū|ja|吉野行宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshino Gyōgū|1=Yoshino Angū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11414514}} ({{ill|Kanwaōji|ja|金輪王寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanwaōji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 吉野行宮|1=Yoshino Angū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11414514}}, {{ill|Jisshōji|ja|実城寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jisshōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135551147}})
* {{ill|Suitengū|en|Suitengū|qid=Q125319456|lt=Suitengū|1=Suitengū}}
[[File:井戸のサイカチ.jpg|500px|thumb|Monument of Gundari Myōō and the Saikachi at the Well, photographed July 2023]]
* {{ill|Guntaishi Shrine|ja|軍太利神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guntaishi Shrine|1=Gundari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11637396}}, {{ill|Guntōri Shrine|ja|軍刀利神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guntōri Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 軍刀利神社 (上野原市)|1=Gundari Shrine, Uenohara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q119929582}} – originally attributed to {{ill|Kuṇḍali|en|Kuṇḍali|qid=Q1064734|lt=Gundari Myōō|1=Kuṇḍali}}
* {{ill|Akiba Shrine|ja|秋葉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|en|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|qid=Q713021|lt=Atago Shrine|1=Atago Shrine (Kyoto)}}
* {{ill|Hakusan Shrine|ja|白山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Iinawa Shrine|ja|飯縄神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iinawa Shrine|1=Iizuna Shrine (Q17238950)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17238950}}
* {{ill|Inari shrine|en|Inari shrine|qid=Q514480|lt=Inari Shrine|1=Inari shrine}}
* {{ill|Emon Shrine|ja|江文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emon Shrine|1=Ebumi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11551131}}
* {{ill|Kumano shrine|en|Kumano shrine|qid=Q3200355|lt=Kumano Shrine|1=Kumano shrine}}
* {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji Shrine|ja|若一王子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji Shrine|1=Nyakuichi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11616187}}
* {{ill|Kōshin|en|Kōshin|qid=Q3082157|lt=Kōshin Faith|1=Kōshin}}
** {{ill|Kōshin-dō|ja|Kōshin-dō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin-dō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135551148}}, {{ill|Kōshin-sha|ja|庚申社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin-sha|1=Kōshin Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11486003}} ({{ill|Seimen Kongō|ja|青面金剛|1=Shōmen Kongō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seimen Kongō|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmen Kongō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11662826}} → {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|ja|猿田彦大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サルタヒコ}})
* {{ill|Kaikoage Shrine|ja|蚕影神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaikoage Shrine|1=Kokage Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17228464}} (Kaikoageyama Kusabayashi-ji)
* {{ill|Yakushi Shrine|ja|薬師神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Konpira Shrine|ja|金毘羅神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金刀比羅神社}}
** {{ill|Kōmyōin Kanshōji|ja|光明院観勝寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōmyōin Kanshōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} → {{ill|Yasui Konpiragū|ja|安井金比羅宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Konpiragū|1=Yasui Kompira-gu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11450246}}
* {{ill|Sannō Shrine|ja|山王神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannō Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Dairokuten Shrine|ja|第六天神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dairokuten Shrine|qq=}}, {{ill|Maō Tennjin Shrine|ja|魔王天神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maō Tennjin Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 第六天神社|1=Dairokuten Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11602399}} (Maō Dairoku-sama, Maō-sama)<ref>[http://www.vill.narusawa.yamanashi.jp/forms/info/info.aspx?info_id=7256 Narusawa Village], [http://www.fujisan-jinja.com/yamanashi/maouten/index.php], [http://www.fujigoko.tv/tdet.cgi?code=4630]</ref> ({{ill|Dai-roku Maō|ja|第六天魔王|1=Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|lt=Demon King of the Sixth Heaven (Dairokuten Maō)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dai-roku Maō|13=User:Immanuelle/Demon King of the Sixth Heaven|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天魔}}, {{ill|Taka-jizaiten|ja|他化自在天|1=Takijizaiten|2=ja|3=Takijizaiten|4=zh|5=他化自在天|6=th|7=ปรนิมมิตวสวัตดี|8=ru|9=Паринимитра-вашавартин|10=ပရနိမ္မိတဝသဝတ္တီဘုံ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taka-jizaiten|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}})
* {{ill|Takakai Shrine|ja|高来神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takakai Shrine|1=Takaku Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11670255}} (Takagai Gongen-sha)
* {{ill|Tanzan Shrine|en|Tanzan Shrine|qid=Q488618|lt=Dansan Shrine|1=Tanzan Shrine}} (located at Tamuho Myōraku-ji)
* {{ill|Chichibu Imamiya Shrine|ja|秩父今宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chichibu Imamiya Shrine|1=Chichibu Imamiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11596110}} (Hachidai Shrine, Ōmiya Yamamanmitsuji, Nagadake-san Shōkakuin Kongōji, and {{ill|Hachidai Ryūō|ja|八大龍王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachidai Ryūō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八大竜王|1=Eight Great Dragon Kings|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11390736}} Shrine)
* {{ill|Myōken Shrine|ja|妙見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 妙見宮 (曖昧さ回避)}} (Myōken-gū)
* {{ill|Chiba Shrine|en|Chiba Shrine|qid=Q11406700|lt=Chiba Shrine|1=Chiba Shrine}} (Chiba Myōken-gū ({{ill|Myōken|en|Myōken|qid=Q10960623|lt=Myōken Bosatsu|1=Myōken}}, {{ill|Hokushin Myōkensōseiō|ja|北辰妙見尊星王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokushin Myōkensōseiō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 妙見菩薩|1=Myōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10960623}}) → {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}})
* {{ill|Chitachi Shrine|ja|知立神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chitachi Shrine|1=Chiryu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11584639}}
* {{ill|Benten-sha|ja|弁天社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benten-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁才天|1=Benzaiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q818468}}, {{ill|Benten-gū|ja|弁天宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benten-gū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135551149}} ({{ill|Benzaiten|ja|弁財天|qid=Q818468|lt=Benzaiten|lt_ja=辨財天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benzaiten|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁才天|1=Benzaiten}} Shrine) → {{ill|Itsukushima Shrine|en|Itsukushima Shrine|qid=Q191763|lt=Itsukushima Shrine|1=Itsukushima Shrine}}
** {{ill|Sukon Benten Shrine|ja|洲干辨天社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukon Benten Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 厳島神社 (横浜市中区)|1=Itsukushima Shrine (Hagoromochō, Yokohama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11410138}} (Shimizu Benten, Hama Benten) → split to form {{ill|Zōtokuin|ja|本泉寺増徳院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zōtokuin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Itsukushima Shrine (Yokohama)|ja|厳島神社 (横浜市中区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsukushima Shrine (Yokohama)|1=Itsukushima Shrine (Hagoromochō, Yokohama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11410138}} ({{ill|Munakata Sanjoshin|ja|宗像三女神|1=Three Munakata Goddesses|1=Three Munakata Goddesses|qq=Three Munakata Goddesses|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Munakata Sanjoshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Munakata Goddesses|qq=}})
* {{ill|Togakushi Shrine|en|Togakushi Shrine|qid=Q218828|lt=Togakushi Shrine|1=Togakushi Shrine}}
* {{ill|Haruna Shrine|en|Haruna Shrine|qid=Q3128007|lt=Haruna Shrine|1=Haruna Shrine}} (Mangyō Gongen, Haruna-san Gandenji Mangyō-gū)
* {{ill|Yuka Shrine Main Shrine|ja|由加神社本宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuka Shrine Main Shrine|1=Yuga Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11577571}}
* {{ill|Akama Shrine|en|Akama Shrine|qid=Q712617|lt=Akama Jingu|1=Akama Shrine}} (Amida-ji, Antoku Tennō Mikage-dō)
* {{ill|Kosuge Shrine (Iiyama)|ja|小菅神社 (飯山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kosuge Shrine (Iiyama)|qq=}} (Kosugayama Mototaka-ji)
* {{ill|Oda Hachiman Shrine|ja|小田八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Hachiman Shrine|1=Koda-hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11462915}} (Oda Bishamondō, Oda Yamatoku-ji)
* {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nara)|ja|猿田彦神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Nara)|1=Sarutahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22118895}} (Moto-dera precinct shrine)
; Taoism and Onmyōdō
* {{ill|Chintaku Reifu Shrine|ja|鎮宅霊符神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chintaku Reifu Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Chintaku Reifu Shin|ja|鎮宅霊符神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chintaku Reifu Shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鎮宅霊符|1=Chintaku Reifu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q86740326}} → {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}})
* {{ill|Komatsu Shrine (Katano)|ja|小松神社 (交野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komatsu Shrine (Katano)|1=Hoshida Myōkengū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11461218}} (Chintaku Reifu Shin, {{ill|Myōken|en|Myōken|qid=Q10960623|lt=Myōken Bosatsu|1=Myōken}} → {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}})
* {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine|ja|星宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine|ja|大将軍神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishogun Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Taishogun-sha|ja|大将軍社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishogun-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大将軍神社|1=Daishōgun Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11434525}}, {{ill|Taishogun Hachigami Shrine|ja|大将軍八神社|1=Daishōgun Hachi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishogun Hachigami Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Hachi Shrine|qq=}}) ({{ill|Taishogun|ja|大将軍|1=Daishōgun (directional deity)|lt=Daishōgun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishogun|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (directional deity)|qq=}} → {{ill|Iwanaga-hime|en|Iwanaga-hime|qid=Q8191705|lt=Iwanaga-hime|1=Iwanaga-hime}}, {{ill|Kunado-no-Kami|en|Kunado-no-Kami|qid=Q2963653|lt=Kunado-no-Kami|1=Kunado-no-Kami}}, {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}})
== Temples and Shrines Subjected to Buddhist Destroy-and-Dismantle Campaigns ==
* {{ill|Aoi Aso Shrine|en|Aoi Aso Shrine|qid=Q2857960|lt=Aoi Aso Shrine|1=Aoi Aso Shrine}}
* {{ill|Kinkameyama Yoganji|ja|金亀山与願寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinkameyama Yoganji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} → {{ill|Enoshima Daishi|ja|江の島大師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enoshima Daishi|1=Enoshima Daishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11550563}} and {{ill|Enoshima Shrine|en|Enoshima Shrine|qid=Q11259219|lt=Ejima Shrine|1=Enoshima Shrine}}
* {{ill|Kennin-ji|en|Kennin-ji|qid=Q1440954|lt=Kennin-ji|1=Kennin-ji}} (The temple’s estate was greatly reduced)
* {{ill|Shinsenen|en|Shinsenen|qid=Q11590468|lt=Shinsen-en|1=Shinsenen}} (The temple’s estate was significantly reduced, its main gate demolished, and the separation of Shinto and Buddhism enforced on its grounds)
* Kiyama Palace → {{ill|Kiyama Shrine|ja|木山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyama Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木山寺|1=Kiyama-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11518309}} and {{ill|Kiyama-dera|ja|木山寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyama-dera|1=Kiyama-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11518309}}
* {{ill|Minase-dono|ja|水無瀬殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minase-dono|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 水無瀬神宮|1=Minase Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q705121}} → (Hokkedō) → {{ill|Minase Miya|ja|水無瀬宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minase Miya|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 水無瀬神宮|1=Minase Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q705121}} (Buddhist style) → {{ill|Minase Shrine|en|Minase Shrine|qid=Q705121|lt=Minase Jingū|1=Minase Shrine}}
; Abolition of the Gongen Title
* Ōji Gongen → {{ill|Inbe Shrine|en|Inbe Shrine|qid=Q11490722|lt=Kibune Shrine|1=Inbe Shrine}}
=== Before the Edo Period ====
* Tenharayama Doin Anraku-ji → {{ill|Dazaifu Tenmangū|en|Dazaifu Tenmangū|qid=Q710786|lt=Dazaifu Tenmangū|1=Dazaifu Tenmangū}}
* Hōjuin → {{ill|Kurumaori Shrine|ja|車折神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurumaori Shrine|1=Kurumazaki Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11637305}}
